content:
It seems that the issue persists even after recalculating the file. At this point, I would recommend trying a different approach to resolve the issue.

One possible solution is to use a different formula or function that can achieve the same result as the INDEX-MATCH formula. For example, you could use VLOOKUP or HLOOKUP instead of INDEX-MATCH.

Another possible solution is to try using a different syntax or format for the formulas. For example, you could try using the exclamation mark syntax instead of the dot syntax.

If none of these solutions work, it may be worth trying to troubleshoot the issue further by checking the LibreOffice documentation or seeking help from a LibreOffice expert.
